scripts.build: npm run build:packages && npm run build:admin-web && npm run build:public-api
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck:packages && npm run typecheck:admin-web && npm run typecheck:public-api
scripts.typecheck:packages: npm run prisma:generate && tsc --pretty false --noEmit --tsBuildInfoFile /tmp/command-core-config.tsbuildinfo -p packages/core-config/tsconfig.json && tsc --pretty false --noEmit --tsBuildInfoFile /tmp/command-core-db.tsbuildinfo -p packages/core-db/tsconfig.json && tsc --pretty false --noEmit --tsBuildInfoFile /tmp/command-core-brand-runtime.tsbuildinfo -p packages/core-brand-runtime/tsconfig.json && tsc --pretty false --noEmit --tsBuildInfoFile /tmp/command-core-email.tsbuildinfo -p packages/core-email/tsconfig.json && tsc --pretty false --noEmit --tsBuildInfoFile /tmp/command-core-auth-backoffice.tsbuildinfo -p packages/core-auth-backoffice/tsconfig.json && tsc --pretty false --noEmit --tsBuildInfoFile /tmp/command-core-auth-external.tsbuildinfo -p packages/core-auth-external/tsconfig.json && tsc --pretty false --noEmit --tsBuildInfoFile /tmp/command-core-leads.tsbuildinfo -p packages/core-leads/tsconfig.json && tsc --pretty false --noEmit --tsBuildInfoFile /tmp/command-core-scheduling.tsbuildinfo -p packages/core-scheduling/tsconfig.json && tsc --pretty false --noEmit --tsBuildInfoFile /tmp/command-core-partners.tsbuildinfo -p packages/core-partners/tsconfig.json && tsc --pretty false --noEmit --tsBuildInfoFile /tmp/command-core-content.tsbuildinfo -p packages/core-content/tsconfig.json && tsc --pretty false --noEmit --tsBuildInfoFile /tmp/command-core-website-analytics.tsbuildinfo -p packages/core-website-analytics/tsconfig.json
